markdown:
#  View the Deleted Specifications Report 
##  Background 
The Deleted Specifications report lists all specification sections deleted from a project, along with the deletion date and the name of the user who deleted them.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Delete Specification Section Revisions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/delete-spec-section-revisions)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click the **Recycle Bin** tab.  
This following information is displayed:
     * **Number**. The specification section number.
     * **Revision**. The specification section revision number.
     * **Issued Date**. The date the specification section was issued.
     * **Received Date**. The date the specification section was received.
     * **Set**. The name of the set.
     * **Deleted Date**. The date the specification section was deleted.
     * **Deleted By**. The name of the person who deleted the specification section.
  3. Take one of the following actions:
     * Download
       * Mark the checkbox next to the desired specification section.
       * Click ![Icon Download Cloud](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2e19fa801eec8349afb1bedda0f7fc83/68221957a68806112406f3c6ce7bfdc7/icon-download-cloud.png?fm=webp&h=19) **Download.**  
_Note:_ You cannot retrieve deleted specification sections. Instead, you must download it. If you want to add it back to the Specifications tool, see [Upload Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/upload-specifications).
     * [Search and Filter for Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/search-for-and-filter-specifications)
     * Export
       1. Click **Export**.
       2. Select **PDF** or **CSV**.
       3. Click the **download**![Icon Download Cloud](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2e19fa801eec8349afb1bedda0f7fc83/68221957a68806112406f3c6ce7bfdc7/icon-download-cloud.png?fm=webp&h=19) icon.


## See Also

  * [Insights Pilot Questions](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-insights-pilot-questions)
  * [Mark Specifications as Obsolete](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/mark-specifications-as-obsolete)
title: View the Deleted Specifications Report
description: How to view a Deleted Specifications Report in the Specifications tool.
